title: kohautia lasiocarpa var. subverticillata
intro: Kohautia lasiocarpa var. subverticillata, also known as a variety of the Kohautia lasiocarpa plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. It is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain, swelling, and infection. Kohautia lasiocarpa var. subverticillata is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
